app.title: Rivr
app.tagline: Directing you to the right care.
app.disclaimer: Rivr is an AI-powered pre-assessment tool and does not provide medical diagnoses. Always seek professional medical advice. In an emergency, call 911.

vitals.title: Vital Signs Scan
vitals.subtitle: Hold your face steady in front of the camera
vitals.instruction: Position your face within the frame and remain still for 30 seconds
vitals.cameraPermission: We need camera access to read your vitals. No images are stored or transmitted.
vitals.cameraError: Unable to access camera. Please grant camera permission and try again.

questions.greeting: Hello! I'm here to help assess your symptoms. Can you tell me, what's bothering you today?
questions.duration: How long has this been going on?
questions.severity: On a scale of 1 to 10, how severe would you say it is?
questions.medications: Are you currently taking any medications?
questions.allergies: Do you have any known allergies?

selfcare.title: Self-Care at Home
selfcare.subtitle: Your symptoms can be managed at home
selfcare.warningTitle: Seek immediate care if you experience:

pharmacy.title: Visit a Pharmacy
pharmacy.subtitle: A pharmacist can help with your symptoms

report.disclaimerNote: This report was generated by Rivr, an AI-powered pre-assessment tool. It is not a medical diagnosis and should be used as supplementary information only.
